summary: Tested city-based Lead Scoring Model features. Fixed API endpoint bug for city fetching. 9/10 features working correctly. One data issue found with duplicate default models in database.

minor.issue: Returns duplicate 'default' models - database has 2 identical default scoring models

issues: 'Configured cities' badges show 'Default (5)' twice due to duplicate models in database

action_items: Remove duplicate default scoring model from database (one of the two 'default' models should be deleted)
seed_data_creation: Used existing default scoring model with 5 categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: City-based Lead Scoring tested. Key routes: /lead-scoring-model for admin, Lead Scoring Card on Lead Detail page. City selector dropdown works with master locations API. Bug fixed: changed fetchCities API call from /api/master-data/master-locations/flat to /api/master-locations/flat. Database has duplicate default models causing badge display issue.

city_selector_on_admin_page.details: City selector dropdown shows with data-testid='city-selector'

city_options_include_default_and_master_.details: Shows 'Default (All Cities)' plus 13 master cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kochi, Kolkata, Margao, Mumbai, New Delhi, Noida, Panaji, Pune, Vasco da Gama)

configured_cities_badges.details: Badges show but display 'Default (5)' twice due to duplicate models in database

copy_to_city_button.details: Copy to City button visible with data-testid='copy-model-btn' when model has categories

load_default_model_seeds_5_categories.details: Default model has 5 categories: Volume Potential (25), Margin Potential (20), Brand Prestige (20), Guest Influence (20), Sustainability Alignment (15)

categories_and_tiers_display.details: All categories display correctly with weights and tiers. Total weight: 100/100

lead_scoring_card_on_lead_detail.details: Lead Scoring Card appears on Lead Detail page with data-testid='lead-scoring-card'

model_indicator_text.details: Shows 'Using model for: Default (fallback)' for leads in cities without city-specific models

all_5_categories_in_card.details: Card shows all 5 categories with max points: Volume Potential (25), Margin Potential (20), Brand Prestige (20), Guest Influence (20), Sustainability Alignment (15)

score_lead_button.details: Score Lead button opens scoring interface with 5 tier select dropdowns

bug_fixed.issue: Wrong API endpoint for fetching cities
